crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update heartbeat, check inbox/tasks, write memory, and continue the highest-priority safe coding task.

crons.name: coding-pr-review-queue
crons.prompt: Review configured PR queues from coding/repositories.json. Draft findings only; request approval before posting externally.

crons.name: coding-ci-scan
crons.prompt: Scan configured CI failures and record notes in work/ci/. Create tasks for actionable failures.
